creator: StevenFriedrich@InsightBB.com
text:
Ok, this chipset is a PCI Express, not AGP.  But it doesn't enable DRM
either.  Is it simply unsupported because the PCI signature isn't in the
header file?

I'm using xorg 7.2 with the only recognized problem being no direct
rendering, affecting the speed of GL screensavers...

Steven Friedrich
